name: oficina
notes: A Fábrica (v2.5, R4, D-23/D-25a): generic synthesizer-console placeholder used for all 4 oficinas (Forja/Cozinha/Bancada/Estaleiro) — option (b) from the R4 tela task. D-25a's own 'sintetizador atemporal' aesthetic already commits to ONE machine archetype forever (style comes from the recipe/material, never a duplicated machine), so a single generic console read 4x with a name label (site/src/renderer.ts's drawPlayerName, same as Nativos) is the on-lore choice, not just the cheap one. Squat metal console, flat lid, flared anvil-like foot, top-left light source (same convention as no_avatar/nativo_*). The glowing slot on its face is deliberately the same violet/crimson pulse pair as O Núcleo and the HUD accent (--nos-accent/--nos-pulse) — a small visual rhyme: A Fábrica's machines are fed by the same Pulso the Núcleo breathes.
